title: AI Engineer
tagline: I architect enterprise AI systems — LangGraph agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM fine-tuning — with 6+ years shipping production platforms for global telecommunications clients.
metaDescription: Annamalai Kathiresan — AI-focused Lead Engineer. LangGraph, RAG, LLM fine-tuning, FastAPI, and production AI for enterprise telecommunications.

about.prose: I'm an AI-focused lead engineer with 6+ years building enterprise web applications and integrating generative AI into production. At Tata Communications, I architect LangGraph agents for conversational commerce, RAG pipelines grounded in live product catalogs, and automated RCA for production incidents — bridging Angular 19 micro frontends with Python/FastAPI AI backends. I treat ML systems as software: evaluation metrics, deployment guardrails, and cross-functional delivery matter as much as model quality.

items.title: Hosted SASE & TC SSE — AI Procurement Platform
items.context: Enterprise security products where global data center license procurement moved from UI-heavy workflows to an AI-first conversational experience.
items.built: Production LangGraph agent with cyclical graph logic, tool calling, and human-in-the-loop fallbacks; Python/FastAPI backend with streaming generators and GPT-OSS LLMs; RAG pipeline with semantic chunking, embedding models, and HNSW/ANN search over live product docs and pricing catalogs; PEFT fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA, SFT) on domain datasets; Angular 19 micro frontend architecture hosting AI components independently.
items.outcome: 95% intent accuracy on multi-turn license configuration and order placement; 30% faster builds via independent AI/UI releases; retrieval-quality benchmarks and LLM evaluation metrics gating production rollout.

items.title: LangGraph RCA Agent
items.context: Production incidents requiring log analysis, database queries, and multi-step reasoning across enterprise security infrastructure.
items.built: LangGraph-driven root cause analysis agent with automated reasoning loops — querying logs and databases, routing between tool calls, and escalating with human-in-the-loop when confidence is low.
items.outcome: 40% reduction in incident resolution time through automated multi-step diagnosis instead of manual triage.

items.title: RAG Knowledge Assistant
items.context: Question answering over custom document collections with grounded, cited responses.
items.built: Retrieval pipeline with semantic chunking, vector embeddings, cosine similarity search, and LLM answer generation — source attribution wired through so every answer cites the chunks it came from.
items.outcome: Accurate answers on domain-specific content with per-chunk citations; retrieval quality measured against a hand-built eval set.

items.title: LLM Agent Workflow
items.context: Multi-step task completion requiring tool calls and memory across turns.
items.built: LangChain agent with tool calling, conversation memory, structured output parsing, and fallback handling when a tool call fails mid-task.
items.outcome: Reliable multi-step execution — failed tool calls degrade gracefully instead of derailing the run.

highlights: Lead end-to-end development of Hosted SASE and TC SSE for Tata Communications — transforming data center licensing into an AI-first procurement platform
Architect production LangGraph AI agents with tool calling, router agents, and human-in-the-loop fallbacks for conversational commerce
Engineer RAG pipelines with semantic chunking, HNSW/ANN vector search, and compliance check-nodes grounding LLM outputs in live catalogs
Apply PEFT fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA, SFT) and LLM evaluation metrics before production rollout on regulated enterprise workflows
Direct a cross-functional team of 11 through the transition from UI-based workflows to AI-first experiences
Led front-end development for Verizon, TOFL Learn, and Comcast — Angular and React apps with enterprise reliability standards
Built data-heavy analytics dashboards and AWS-backed mobile apps; resolved 45+ critical production bugs
Mentored junior developers and received multiple performance awards including Extra Mile, ACE, and WOW

contact.message: Open to AI engineering and lead engineer roles — especially teams building production LLM systems, RAG pipelines, or agent orchestration at scale.
